Top Performing Posts 1:
Sourdough is naturally fermented dough made with a living starter. Not commercial yeast packets.

During long fermentation, natural cultures help transform the dough’s structure, creating deeper flavor and a crust with real character.

At Real Dough, we ferment for 24+ hours using our living mother starter and small-batch production.

Most frozen pizza dough is developed in just a couple of hours at industrial scale. We take our time, because fermentation changes everything about this crust. 🍕✨

#realdoughpizzaco #realdough #sourdoughpizza #sourdoughpizzacrust #sourdough

👨‍🍳 🍕 A few pro tips straight from the Real Dough Pizza Co. creators:
• Keep the pizza frozen until your oven is fully preheated
• Bake it on the center rack
• Let it rest on a cooling rack for 1 to 3 minutes before slicing

Our one-of-a-kind, cold fermented sourdough crust took 24+ hours to develop flavor and texture. A few small steps make sure you get the crispy exterior and airy interior it was built for. 

Simple. Intentional. Worth it.

#realdoughpizzaco #realdough #sourdoughpizza #sourdoughpizzacrust #protips

We’re three childhood best friends who traded cubicles for scratch kitchens.

Along the way, we saw a frozen pizza aisle that had gotten comfortable with “good enough.” We weren’t.

Real Dough is built the same way we ran our restaurants. The dough ferments. The ingredients matter. Quality is non-negotiable.

At the heart of it all is our one-of-a-kind, naturally fermented sourdough crust made from a living mother starter and held to European-style fermentation standards.

Pizza you would serve a friend. Not something you apologize for.

Posts By Engagement:
Founder Pro Tips. 🍕

Tip 1: Keep it frozen until the oven preheats.
Tip 2: Center rack. Not top. Not bottom. Center.
Tip 3: Let it hang out on a cooling rack for 1 to 3 minutes.

Cold fermented sourdough deserves a little respect. That’s how you get the crispy edges and airy chew we worked 24+ hours for. You’re welcome.

#realdoughpizzaco #realdough #sourdoughpizza #sourdoughpizzacrust #protips
